text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, July 28. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Moonlight Sonata for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Let's get that resolved. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
